error_signature: async authenticate doesn't work in n8n v1.80.3
title: Async authenticate fails in latest n8n version
symptom: The custom credential type 'Solapi API' is not visible in the authentication settings of the HTTP request node in n8n v1.80.3, while it was available in v1.68.1.
applies_when: Upgrading from n8n v1.68.1 to v1.80.3
root_cause: The issue arises from using an incompatible version of the n8n-workflow library with the custom credential implementation. The changes in the library may have affected how custom credentials are registered and recognized in newer versions of n8n.
fix_steps: Ensure you are using the correct version of the n8n-workflow library that is compatible with n8n v1.80.3.
Update your project dependencies to use 'n8n-nodes-starter' if necessary.
agent_instruction: Check and update the n8n-workflow library version to ensure compatibility.
